# iosxe_stackwise_virtual (Data Source)

This data source can read the Stackwise Virtual configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxe_stackwise_virtual" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `domain` (Number)
- `dual_active_detection_pagp` (Boolean) Dual-active detection using PAgP
- `dual_active_detection_pagp_trust_channel_group` (Number) Percent range from 1 to 128.
- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.
